title: Always_comb with IF statement, may not simulate correctly.

features.name: always_comb if-else with read-before-write in else branch
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block with an if-else statement where the else branch reads a signal (b) and then assigns to that same signal in the same branch

features.name: clocked always block driving selector used in always_comb
features.description: Code should include a clocked always block that drives a selector signal which is used in an always_comb if condition to select between branches
